docs.text:
Apify Documentation
Skip to main content
Apify Documentation
Learn how to put the web to work.
Getting started
Apify is all about Actors—a new way to package your code to make it easy to share, integrate, and build upon.
What is an Actor
Run an existing Actor
Develop your own Actor
Publish and monetize your Actor
Platform
The full reference of the Apify platform.
Actors
Develop, run, and share web scraping and automation tools in the cloud.
Storage
Store files and results of your web scraping jobs, and export it to various formats.
Proxy
Avoid blocking by smartly rotating datacenter and residential IP addresses.
Schedules
Automatically start Actors and saved tasks at specific times.
Integrations
Connect Actors with your favorite web apps and cloud services.
Monitoring
Check the performance of your Actors, validate data quality, and receive alerts.
Collaboration
Share Actors with other people, manage your organizations and permissions.
Security
Learn about Apify platform security and data protection.
MCP
Discover and use Actors with AI agents and LLMs via Apify MCP server.
Apify API
Interact with the Apify platform from your applications.
API client for JavaScript
API client for Python
API reference
Apify SDK
Software toolkits for developing new Actors.
SDK for JavaScript
SDK for Python
Apify CLI
Control the Apify platform from terminal or shell scripts.
CLI reference
Apify Academy
Free practical courses on web scraping and the Apify platform. Go from beginner to expert, all in one place.
Web scraping for beginners
Learn the basics of web scraping and how to develop your own scraper.
Introduction to the Apify platform
Learn the basics of the Apify platform and how to use it for your scraping projects.
API scraping
Learn how to efficiently extract data from web pages' APIs.
Anti-scraping protections
Understand the various anti-scraping measures and how to avoid them.
Advanced web scraping
Learn how to extract data from more complicated websites.
Deploying your code to Apify
Learn how to easily move your existing projects to the Apify platform.
Go to Academy
Open-source tools
Crawlee
Web crawling, scraping, and browser automation library for Node.js and Python with autoscaling and proxies.
Star
Fingerprint Suite
Toolkit for generating and injecting realistic browser fingerprints into Playwright and Puppeteer.
Star
impit
Rust-based HTTP client with browser impersonation. Bindings for Node.js, Python, and CLI.
Star
mcpc
CLI client for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for server exploration, scripting, and code mode.
Star
proxy-chain
Node.js proxy server with SSL, authentication, and upstream proxy chaining.
Star
Actor whitepaper
Open specification for Actors, the serverless microapps at the core of the Apify platform.
Follow Apify on GitHub
Actor templates
Create new web scraping projects using ready-made templates for various programming languages and scraping libraries.
Browse all templates
Community & Help
Discord
Join our community to get news and connect with other Apify developers.
Support
Find answers to common questions or get help from the Apify support team.
More reading
Blog
Company and product updates, tips and stories from the world of web scraping.
Changelog
See what's new on the Apify platform.
Monetize your code
Publish your Actors on Apify Store and earn regular passive income.
Get started

composio_raw.name: Apify
composio_raw.description: Apify is a platform for building, deploying, and managing web scraping and automation tools, known as Actors.

llm_raw.description: A cloud platform for deploying serverless web scraping and automation Actors, offering proxy, storage, and AI-agent integration tools.
llm_raw.notes: Apify provides a comprehensive REST API and official MCP server support for AI agents. Authentication is performed via personal API tokens.
